textAnswer: I've created a personal webpage with all required sections. Used semantic HTML5 tags including <header>, <main>, <section>, and <footer>. Styled with CSS Grid for layout.
My webpage includes a responsive header with navigation, hero section, about me, and footer. Used Flexbox for responsive design.
feedback: Excellent work! Great use of semantic HTML and responsive design. Minor improvements possible on mobile view.

textAnswer: JavaScript calculator with all basic operations. Added keyboard support and error handling for division by zero.
feedback: Good implementation! Calculator works well. Consider adding more operations like modulus and decimal support.

textAnswer: React to-do app with full CRUD functionality. Uses useState for state management and localStorage for persistence.
feedback: Very clean code! Good use of React hooks. Consider adding edit functionality for existing tasks.

textAnswer: Analyzed customer churn dataset. Includes data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and predictive modeling with visualizations.
feedback: Outstanding analysis! Excellent visualizations and insights. Very well-documented notebook.

textAnswer: Personal webpage project with header, main content sections, and footer. Included external CSS stylesheet.
